title: Mod-erate Loading Screen-Neo
description: This mod enhances the loading screen by adding falling mod icon animations. Additionally, the mod offers many configurable options.
body:
This mod is the NeoForge port of [Mod-erate Loading Screen-Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/mod-erate-loading-screen-forge) which is a Forge port of [Mod-erate Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/moderate-loading-screen). Please do not report any crash logs related to this mod on the original mod's page.

## Introduction
This mod enhances the loading screen by adding falling mod icon animations.
This mod includes experimental support for the NeoForge loading screen, you can disable it in the configuration file.

## License
This mod is open source under the MIT license, just like the original mod.

Example with 200 mods:
![a example picture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e879ca8ed19a94b729893fc85c7aaa3f8e34f5c0.png)
